'''Steef''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who worked for the [[Chev]] businessman [[Orman]]. He was loyal to Orman but was quite lazy and preferred to sleep than fight. In a fight he would often find a way to quietly leave the action.

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission to Lianna]]'' {{1st}}
